note: All icons render at 32x32 output. Vessels/conflicts/GFW/outages/webcams use 48x48 viewBox; satellites/aircraft use 24x24 viewBox.

military.description: Military satellite — black outline, red fill, crosshair/angular shape, 32x32 (24x24 viewBox)

recon.description: Recon satellite — black outline, amber fill, telescope/eye shape, 32x32 (24x24 viewBox)

commercial.description: Commercial satellite — black outline, cyan fill, dish + body + panels, 32x32 (24x24 viewBox)

civilian.description: Civilian satellite — black outline, lime fill, ISS-like truss, 32x32 (24x24 viewBox)

cluster.description: Satellite cluster — black outline bubble with colored tiny satellite shapes, 32x32 (24x24 viewBox)

cargo.description: Cargo/container ship — top-down, colored container grid, gantry cranes

tanker.description: Tanker — top-down, circular tank hatches, centerline pipeline

passenger.description: Passenger/cruise ship — white hull for ocean contrast, yellow lit windows, blue trim, pool deck, helipad

fishing.description: Fishing vessel — top-down, crane/boom, net drums, fishing nets

military.description: Military vessel — destroyer/frigate, gun turrets, VLS cells, radar mast

unknown.description: Unknown vessel — generic hull, question mark indicator

airliner.description: Airliner — wide fuselage, swept wings, engine pods, T-tail, top-down

military.description: Fighter jet — delta wings, canards, twin stabilizers, hardpoints, top-down

light.description: Light prop plane — straight high wings, propeller disc, fixed gear, top-down

general.description: General aviation — mid-size, moderate wings, cabin windows, top-down

alert.description: Dark vessel alert — dark ship silhouette (top-down) with red stroke and red warning badge in upper-right

explosions.description: Explosion — jagged star burst, orange inner layer, white-hot center

battles.description: Battle — assault rifle silhouette (side view), stock, pistol grip, barrel, magazine

violence.description: Violence against civilians — skull and crossbones danger symbol

event.description: GFW suspicious event — no-fishing sign (circle with fish silhouette and diagonal slash)

critical.description: Critical outage — lightning bolt in red circle, double pulse ring, spark dots

warning.description: Warning outage — lightning bolt in orange circle, single pulse ring

default.description: Video camera — body with lens, viewfinder, handle grip, status LED
